_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Programming and build (software engineering) involves advising on the right way to apply standards and methods to ensure compliance; maintain technical responsibility for all the stages and iterations of a software development project; provide technical advice to stakeholders and set the team-based standards for programming tools and techniques.
reference_document_element_description: Develop and maintain program plans for data and AI initiatives, including scope definition, workstream structure, milestone schedule, resource plan, and risk register.
comments: DDaT skill intersects with WIDAI OP domain. OP-T-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-S-008 (AI, cosine: 0.435), AI-T-006 (AI, cosine: 0.428).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.0/10 (raw 0.505). Shared vocabulary: [maintain]. DDaT-only terms [advice, advising, apply, based, build, compliance] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, data, definition, develop, initiatives, milestone] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.845 (P=0.839, R=0.852). Balanced P/R — the 48-word DDaT element and 22-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (99.8%). Despite 'Intersects with' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Programming and build (software engineering) involves advising on the right way" and "Develop and maintain program plans for data and AI initiatives, including scope". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.507 ≈ STS 0.505 (gap 0.002). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [maintain] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 5.7%. Shared tokens: [maintain]. DDaT-only: [advice, advising, apply, based, build, compliance]. WIDAI-only: [ai, data, definition, develop, initiatives, milestone].

signals.detail: NLI contradiction 99.8% suggests semantic tension between the FDE and matched KSA. The competency domains may be adjacent but not functionally aligned.
